criteria.label: Schema Validity
criteria.description: Pipeline artifacts conform to the platform schema and use valid step fields.

criteria.label: Skill Availability
criteria.description: The pipeline uses existing skill IDs or explicitly creates any missing skill first.

criteria.label: Data Flow
criteria.description: Inputs, step outputs, placeholders, and config values are explicit and avoid config bleed.

criteria.label: Output Quality
criteria.description: Final output is human-readable, useful, and avoids unrequested raw JSON.

criteria.label: Safety
criteria.description: Credentials, external calls, and destructive operations follow platform safety rules.

criteria.label: Testability
criteria.description: The design includes a cheap validation path and a realistic full-pipeline smoke test.
